title: Checksy HTTPS manifest v1
description: Strict signed-manifest payload for a Checksy HTTPS source. The signature covers the exact response bytes before this schema is applied.

revision.description: Printable ASCII publisher revision with no leading or trailing space. It is metadata and is never used directly as a filesystem name.

configPath.description: Normalized relative bundle path. Runtime validation also enforces a 1024-byte UTF-8 limit, canonical component traversal, and containment beneath the verified bundle root.

artifactUrl.description: Absolute HTTP(S) URL or relative URI-reference. Runtime validation rejects userinfo and fragments, resolves relative references against the final manifest response URL, and applies the interactive insecure-HTTP policy to every request and redirect.

format.description: The only archive encoding supported by manifest v1.

sizeBytes.description: Exact compressed artifact size in bytes; it is authenticated by the manifest and enforced while downloading.
